posts.author: SarahWestbridge
posts.text: Hi everyone, just to let you know I'll be updating my payment details on the app soon. Please use this link for your deposit: [link removed]. Password required for verification.
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting attempt because it asks for a password and directs users to a payment link, which requires immediate removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
